evidence.today_log_tail:
# memory/2026-04-02.md

## Jordan's reminder
Jordan said: "Remember the files I already sent for the ones I've done — just keep that in mind."

This means: Jordan has ALREADY created/done work on some projects. Don't overwrite his files. Before rewriting any project file, check what already exists.

## Existing files Jordan has worked on:
- MASSAGE-PASS/README.md — Jordan built this
- docs/comare.html — Jordan built this, gyms ICP already locked
- docs/compare.html → renamed to comare.html
- AUTONOMOUS.md — Jordan's goals and backlog
- PROJECTS.md — Jordan's 3 income streams
- Decision-Makers-Real.md — Jordan's research
- Various tools/ files — Jordan set these up

## Rule
Before creating or overwriting any project file:
1. Check if it already exists
2. Read it first
3. Don't replace Jordan's work with my own version unless he asks
